Connections.description: A list of connections and the details for each connection, such as status, owner, and provider type.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used in the next ListConnections call. To view all items in the list, continue to call this operation with each subsequent token until no more nextToken values are returned.

ConnectionName.description: The name of the connection. Connection names must be unique in an Amazon Web Services account.

ConnectionArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection. The ARN is used as the connection reference when the connection is shared between Amazon Web Services services.

The ARN is never reused if the connection is deleted.

ProviderType.description: The name of the external provider where your third-party code repository is configured.

OwnerAccountId.description: The identifier of the external provider where your third-party code repository is configured. For Bitbucket, this is the account ID of the owner of the Bitbucket repository.

HostArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the host associated with the connection.

Hosts.description: A list of hosts and the details for each host, such as status, endpoint, and provider type.

NextToken.description: A token that can be used in the next ListHosts call. To view all items in the list, continue to call this operation with each subsequent token until no more nextToken values are returned.

HostArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the host.

ProviderType.description: The name of the installed provider to be associated with your connection. The host resource represents the infrastructure where your provider type is installed. The valid provider type is GitHub Enterprise Server.

ProviderEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

VpcConfiguration.description: The VPC configuration provisioned for the host.

VpcId.description: The ID of the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

SubnetIds.description: The ID of the subnet or subnets associated with the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

SecurityGroupIds.description: The ID of the security group or security groups associated with the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

TlsCertificate.description: The value of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate associated with the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

Status.description: The status of the host, such as PENDING, AVAILABLE, VPC_CONFIG_DELETING, VPC_CONFIG_INITIALIZING, and VPC_CONFIG_FAILED_INITIALIZATION.

RepositoryLinks.description: Lists the repository links called by the list repository links operation.

NextToken.description: An enumeration token that allows the operation to batch the results of the operation.

ConnectionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection associated with the repository link.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the encryption key for the repository associated with the repository link.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with the repository link, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The provider type for the connection, such as GitHub, associated with the repository link.

RepositoryLinkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the repository link.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with the repository link.

ConnectionArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection to be created. The ARN is used as the connection reference when the connection is shared between Amazon Web Services services.

The ARN is never reused if the connection is deleted.

Tags.description: Specifies the tags applied to the resource.

HostArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the host to be created.

RepositoryLinkInfo.description: The returned information about the created repository link.

ConnectionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection associated with the repository link.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the encryption key for the repository associated with the repository link.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with the repository link, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The provider type for the connection, such as GitHub, associated with the repository link.

RepositoryLinkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the repository link.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with the repository link.

SyncConfiguration.description: The created sync configuration for the connection. A sync configuration allows Amazon Web Services to sync content from a Git repository to update a specified Amazon Web Services resource.

Branch.description: The branch associated with a specific sync configuration.

ConfigFile.description: The file path to the configuration file associated with a specific sync configuration. The path should point to an actual file in the sync configurations linked repository.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with a specific sync configuration, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The connection provider type associated with a specific sync configuration, such as GitHub.

RepositoryLinkId.description: The ID of the repository link associated with a specific sync configuration.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with a specific sync configuration.

ResourceName.description: The name of the connection resource associated with a specific sync configuration.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role associated with a specific sync configuration.

SyncType.description: The type of sync for a specific sync configuration.

PublishDeploymentStatus.description: Whether to enable or disable publishing of deployment status to source providers.

TriggerResourceUpdateOn.description: When to trigger Git sync to begin the stack update.

Connection.description: The connection details, such as status, owner, and provider type.

ConnectionName.description: The name of the connection. Connection names must be unique in an Amazon Web Services account.

ConnectionArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection. The ARN is used as the connection reference when the connection is shared between Amazon Web Services services.

The ARN is never reused if the connection is deleted.

ProviderType.description: The name of the external provider where your third-party code repository is configured.

OwnerAccountId.description: The identifier of the external provider where your third-party code repository is configured. For Bitbucket, this is the account ID of the owner of the Bitbucket repository.

HostArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the host associated with the connection.

ProviderType.description: The provider type of the requested host, such as GitHub Enterprise Server.

ProviderEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the infrastructure represented by the requested host.

VpcConfiguration.description: The VPC configuration of the requested host.

VpcId.description: The ID of the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

SubnetIds.description: The ID of the subnet or subnets associated with the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

SecurityGroupIds.description: The ID of the security group or security groups associated with the Amazon VPC connected to the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

TlsCertificate.description: The value of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate associated with the infrastructure where your provider type is installed.

RepositoryLinkInfo.description: The information returned for a specified repository link.

ConnectionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection associated with the repository link.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the encryption key for the repository associated with the repository link.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with the repository link, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The provider type for the connection, such as GitHub, associated with the repository link.

RepositoryLinkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the repository link.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with the repository link.

LatestSync.description: The status of the latest sync returned for a specified repository and branch.

StartedAt.description: The start time of a specific sync attempt.

Status.description:
The status of a specific sync attempt. The following are valid statuses:

  • INITIATED - A repository sync attempt has been created and will begin soon.

  • IN_PROGRESS - A repository sync attempt has started and work is being done to reconcile the branch.

  • SUCCEEDED - The repository sync attempt has completed successfully.

  • FAILED - The repository sync attempt has failed.

  • QUEUED - The repository sync attempt didn't execute and was queued.

Events.description: The events associated with a specific sync attempt.

DesiredState.description: The desired state of the Amazon Web Services resource for the sync status with the Git repository.

LatestSuccessfulSync.description: The latest successful sync for the sync status with the Git repository.

LatestSync.description: The latest sync for the sync status with the Git repository, whether successful or not.

Branch.description: The branch name for a specific revision.

Directory.description: The directory, if any, for a specific revision.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for a specific revision, such as the GitHub owner ID for a GitHub repository.

RepositoryName.description: The repository name for a specific revision.

ProviderType.description: The provider type for a revision, such as GitHub.

Sha.description: The SHA, such as the commit ID, for a specific revision.

SyncBlockerSummary.description: The list of sync blockers for a specified resource.

ResourceName.description: The resource name for sync blocker summary.

ParentResourceName.description: The parent resource name for a sync blocker summary.

LatestBlockers.description: The latest events for a sync blocker summary.

SyncConfiguration.description: The details about the sync configuration for which you want to retrieve information.

Branch.description: The branch associated with a specific sync configuration.

ConfigFile.description: The file path to the configuration file associated with a specific sync configuration. The path should point to an actual file in the sync configurations linked repository.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with a specific sync configuration, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The connection provider type associated with a specific sync configuration, such as GitHub.

RepositoryLinkId.description: The ID of the repository link associated with a specific sync configuration.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with a specific sync configuration.

ResourceName.description: The name of the connection resource associated with a specific sync configuration.

RoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role associated with a specific sync configuration.

SyncType.description: The type of sync for a specific sync configuration.

PublishDeploymentStatus.description: Whether to enable or disable publishing of deployment status to source providers.

TriggerResourceUpdateOn.description: When to trigger Git sync to begin the stack update.

RepositorySyncDefinitions.description: The list of repository sync definitions returned by the request. A RepositorySyncDefinition is a mapping from a repository branch to all the Amazon Web Services resources that are being synced from that branch.

NextToken.description: An enumeration token that, when provided in a request, returns the next batch of the results.

Branch.description: The branch specified for a repository sync definition.

Directory.description: The configuration file for a repository sync definition. This value comes from creating or updating the config-file field of a sync-configuration.

Parent.description: The parent resource specified for a repository sync definition.

Target.description: The target resource specified for a repository sync definition. In some cases, such as CFN_STACK_SYNC, the parent and target resource are the same.

SyncConfigurations.description: The list of repository sync definitions returned by the request.

NextToken.description: An enumeration token that allows the operation to batch the next results of the operation.

Branch.description: The branch associated with a specific sync configuration.

ConfigFile.description: The file path to the configuration file associated with a specific sync configuration. The path should point to an actual file in the sync configurations linked repository.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with a specific sync configuration, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with a specific sync configuration.

SyncType.description: The type of sync for a specific sync configuration.

PublishDeploymentStatus.description: Whether to enable or disable publishing of deployment status to source providers.

TriggerResourceUpdateOn.description: When to trigger Git sync to begin the stack update.

Tags.description: A list of tag key and value pairs associated with the specified resource.

RepositoryLinkInfo.description: Information about the repository link to be updated.

ConnectionArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the connection associated with the repository link.

EncryptionKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the encryption key for the repository associated with the repository link.

OwnerId.description: The owner ID for the repository associated with the repository link, such as the owner ID in GitHub.

ProviderType.description: The provider type for the connection, such as GitHub, associated with the repository link.

RepositoryLinkArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the repository link.

RepositoryName.description: The name of the repository associated with the repository link.

ResourceName.description: The resource name for the sync blocker.

ParentResourceName.description: The parent resource name for the sync blocker.

SyncBlocker.description: Information about the sync blocker to be updated.

Id.description: The ID for a specific sync blocker.

Status.description: The status for a specific sync blocker.

CreatedReason.description: The provided reason for a specific sync blocker.

CreatedAt.description: The creation time for a specific sync blocker.

Contexts.description: The contexts for a specific sync blocker.

ResolvedReason.description: The resolved reason for a specific sync blocker.

ResolvedAt.description: The time that a specific sync blocker was resolved.
